title: Cobblemon Master Edition
description: Cobblemon Master Edition is a massive 190+ modpack that brings together the ultimate Cobblemon experience with RPG adventures, quests and much more!
body:
Cobblemon Master Edition – The Ultimate Cobblemon Adventure

Cobblemon Master Edition is a massive 180+ mod pack built to create the definitive Cobblemon experience. This pack enhances every part of the game — exploration, combat, quests, immersion, world generation, performance, and building — all while staying true to the Cobblemon style.

✨ Features

🐾 Expanded Cobblemon Gameplay
Includes multiple Cobblemon addons that introduce quests, progression, new systems, QoL improvements, and an overall richer Cobblemon journey.

⚔️ RPG & Adventure Mods
Explore a world filled with new structures, unique loot, powerful enemies, skills, dungeons, bosses, and tons of adventure content inspired by classic RPG modpacks.

🎨 Immersive Visuals
Built-in support for:

Distant Horizons for massive render distances

Shader support for beautiful lighting and shadows

Advanced animation mods for smoother movement and combat

🏗️ Better Building Experience
Dozens of decoration and building-focused mods make creative building easier, prettier, and more detailed than ever before.

🧭 Quality of Life Enhancements
Includes tasteful QoL mods that improve performance, UI, controls, and the overall feel of the game while keeping everything stable.

⭐ Why Cobblemon Master Edition?

This pack combines the best Cobblemon addons, RPG adventure mods, visual upgrades, and building tools into one polished experience. Whether you want to catch every Cobblemon, build amazing bases, or explore a fully upgraded world, this pack has it all.
